_meta.description: Patterns for turning multiple grounded facts into one coherent finding without degenerating into evidence dumping.

runtimeUsageNotes.selectionStage: mid-composition when several evidence items support one answer
runtimeUsageNotes.intent: Summarize evidence clusters into a single conclusion sentence before exposing detail.

synthesisPatterns.when: multiple table rows support one metric claim
synthesisPatterns.preferredShape: single finding sentence then two strongest supports

synthesisPatterns.when: several clauses jointly define an obligation or limit
several dated events create one timeline conclusion
different documents point to the same conclusion

rules.trigger: Three or more evidence points support one claim
